title: AN ACT NAMING THE JAGNA DISTRICT HOSPITAL AS THE TEODORO B. GALAGAR DISTRICT HOSPITAL

chunks.text:
H. No. 24629 / 88 OG No. 24, 3734 (June 15, (1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7435, April 23, 1991 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE JAGNA DISTRICT HOSPITAL AS THE TEODORO B. GALAGAR DISTRICT HOSPITAL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Jagna District Hospital is hereby named as Teodoro B. Galagar District Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 23, 1991 and February 3, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APRIL 23, 1991

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
